arts.ttl: Arsenal's title hopes in tatters as ten-man Gunners fall to West Ham - 5 talking points
arts.sum: ARSENAL 0-1 WEST HAM: Jarrod Bowen's strike just minutes before half-time was enough for Graham Potter to get a big victory that leaves the Gunners title hopes hanging by a thread

arts.ttl: Arsenal 0-1 West Ham: Jarrod Bowen strikes a Hammer blow to the Gunners' title dreams as Myles Lewis-Skelly is sent off in their first home Premier League defeat of the season
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL AT THE EMIRATES STADIUM: Arsenal lost at home in the Premier League for the first time this season as West Ham United dealt a major blow to their title aspirations.

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement as Arsenal's Myles Lewis-Skelly sent off by VAR again
arts.sum: Arsenal were a goal down to West Ham when Myles Lewis-Skelly was sent off for bringing down Mohammed Kudus as the last man, though referee Craig Pawson at first only booked the left-back

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly is SENT OFF for second time in a month as things go from bad-to-worse for Arsenal against West Ham
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly saw red for Arsenal for the second time in a month after he was sent off in their game against West Ham on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given major Kai Havertz and Takehiro Tomiyasu injury updates after surgery
arts.sum: Arteta's squad are short of options in the final third, but will be pleased to hear that Havertz's surgery went well, along with Tomiyasu, as Odegaard gave an insight into the Gunners' training ground in his pre-match programme notes this week. Speaking to Arsenal's in-house media, Odegaard said: "We spent a few days in Dubai, which we used as a good balance between hard work and rest.

arts.ttl: Arsenal STEP UP Lookman pursuit despite Gasperini apology
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to 'return to the charge' for long-time target Ademola Lookman after his falling out with Gian Piero Gasperini. Lookman to leave despite Gasperini apology

arts.ttl: Calafiori starts first Arsenal Premier League game in over a month
arts.sum: Italy international Riccardo Calafiori starts for Arsenal in a London derby against West Ham. It...

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Tottenham to bid for “excellent” midfielder with a “brilliant future”
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Brazilian midfielder Breno Bidon from Corinthians when the transfer window reopens in the summer. The 20-year-old midfielder is highly rated across South America and he has a bright future. He has been described as an excellent player with a brilliant future ahead. “Breno Bidon is an […] The post Arsenal & Tottenham to bid for “excellent” midfielder with a “brilliant future” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes decision on Arsenal's new striker as Raheem Sterling pays price
arts.sum: Arsenal take on London rivals West Ham on Saturday afternoon amid an ongoing injury crisis and the Gunners have now revealed the side that will take on the Hammers

arts.ttl: Is Arsenal vs West Ham on TV? Live stream, channel and how to watch
arts.sum: Arsenal's clash against West Ham is scheduled to kick off at 3pm on Saturday, February 22, at the Emirates Stadium in the Premier League. The kick-off time gives Arsenal the possibility of closing the gap to five points for at least 24 hours before Liverpool are back in action, where they face Manchester City on Sunday.
